intelligence.hypothesis: Insufficient telemetry; awaiting next valid capture.

compositional_truth_check.reconciliation_notes: The registry is largely non-representative of the visual data. P1 (String of Nickels) is absent or dormant. P2 (Mexican Mint) and P4 (Silver Guest) are not identifiable as distinct specimens. P3 (Pothos) is present but severely obscured by low-light conditions and lack of foliage density.

P2/P4 (Mexican Mint/Silver Guest): No identifiable plant matter present in the designated black pot.

Intervention: Introduction of a white plastic/ceramic object (possibly a sensor or tool) in the yellow pot (Image CURRENT).

plant_audit.p1_yellow_pot: Bare soil/Empty. No botanical growth observed.
plant_audit.p2_p4_black_pot: Bare soil/Empty. No botanical growth observed.
plant_audit.p3_black_pot: Contains the white rabbit anchor. Minimal to no visible foliage; appears to be a dormant or failed specimen.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Consistently dark and damp across all pots; no signs of surface cracking.
biome_observations.desk_surface: Stable, no debris or organic matter accumulation.

temporal_deltas.t2_to_t1: Introduction of a metallic spoon into the yellow pot.
temporal_deltas.t1_to_current: Removal of the spoon; introduction of a white object/sensor into the yellow pot.

visual_health_inference.reasoning: The biome is currently devoid of viable plant life. The presence of tools (spoon, sensor) suggests an experimental or monitoring setup rather than a thriving botanical environment. The 'rabbit' anchor is the only consistent element.

anomalies: Presence of non-botanical artifacts (spoon, white sensor) in the yellow pot.
Total absence of expected foliage in all pots.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a sterile environment. Despite the registry, there is no evidence of P1, P2, or P4. P3 is present only as a structural anchor (the rabbit). The sequence documents the introduction and subsequent removal of a spoon, followed by the placement of a white sensor-like object in the yellow pot. The biome is currently non-functional in terms of plant health.
